name: Cavatelli Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook and drain the 6 oz package of spiral noodles.
2. Combine the cooked noodles with the 10-oz can or jar of pizza sauce.
3. Add the 8-oz can of tomato sauce to the mixture. Season with salt to taste.
4. Mix in the ground hamburger, ensuring it is browned and drained.
5. If desired, add chopped onion to the casserole.
6. Cover the dish with shredded Monterey Jack or mozzarella cheese.
7. Bake at 350°F for about 30 minutes.
